Please fill out this template to help us review your PR efficiently.

### Screenshots (for UI changes)

### Checklist
<!-- Ensure all items are checked before submitting -->

- [ ] Code follows existing style (run `go fmt` and `go vet`)
- [ ] Tests pass: `go test -race ./...`
- [ ] Build succeeds: `go build ./...`
- [ ] New tests added for new functionality
- [ ] Documentation updated (if needed)
- [ ] ADR created (if architecture change)
- [ ] No hardcoded credentials or secrets
- [ ] License header added to new files (SPDX)

### ADR (if applicable)
<!-- If this PR includes architectural changes, link the ADR here -->
<!-- Example: See docs/ADR-015-plugin-architecture.md -->

### Additional Context
<!-- Any other relevant context about this PR -->

### For Maintainers

- [ ] Reviewer assigned
- [ ] All checks pass
- [ ] PR merged
